task: /pr-quality:all adversarial fix-loop on M1 PR: 7 CI gate findings remediated (eval orphans, REQ-007 AC5, doc-accuracy tense, ADR-040 enumeration, plugin.json counts, PLAN decision log)

events.content: Identified pr-quality-gate-{analyst,architect,qa,security,devops,roadmap}.md + session-protocol-check.md as in-scope. Other prompts (issue-*, spec-*, metrics-*) out of scope for PR review.
Verdicts: qa BLOCKED (3 findings); analyst WARN (4 findings); roadmap WARN (3 findings); architect PASS (2 low); security PASS; devops PASS (3 info); session-protocol-check COMPLIANT.

Critical: triage-prompts.json eval orphans, REQ-007-AC5 unenforceable, doc-accuracy description tense. Important: ADR-040 stale enumeration, plugin.json stale counts, PLAN decision log gap (workflow PRUNE rationale), REQ-007 deferred section.
7993ed9f. Converted workflow/doc-coverage/doc-sync blocks to negative-routing fixtures. Updated codebase-documenter cross-refs.

f937a114. Reworded 'Consolidates X' to 'replaced the former X (deleted 2026-05-09)'. Mirrored to src/copilot-cli/ + docs/SKILL-AUTHORING.md. Added 'text' lang identifier to two pre-existing unfenced code blocks.
a3c82a66. AC5 now points at generate_skills.py round-trip idempotence (not nonexistent detect_skill_drift.py). Deferred section lists 4 items routed to follow-up PRs.

ADR-040:119 doc-sync removed from Tier 2 list, count 12->11, percentage 44.4%->42.3%. plugin.json: dropped literal '23 agents, 23 slash commands, 35 lifecycle hooks, 69 reusable skills' since real counts are 25/24/30/67.
adfe9f5d. Documented reversal of analysis F3 (KEEP as deprecation guide) -> spec/plan PRUNE. Cited migration table in docs/workflow-commands.md as the surviving documentation surface.

Verdicts: qa APPROVED, roadmap PASS, analyst WARN (3 NEW regressions), architect WARN (1 NEW regression). Architect/analyst flagged: triage-prompts.json doc-accuracy fixture hedge ('may be redundant'); ADR-040 Tier 1/3 percentages stale after Tier 2 changed denominator from 27 to 26.

4e077b50. Strengthened doc-accuracy fixture (deleted, not 'may be redundant'). Recalculated ADR-040 Tier 1 (40.7%->42.3%) and Tier 3 (14.8%->15.4%) on /26 denominator. Added historical caveat to ADR S356 section.
Both PASS. Math sums to 100%. No regressions. Recursion complete.
Convergence model: CI=backstop, /review=primary. Sub-issue native linking via GraphQL addSubIssue. Vendor-survival constraint baked into every child.

Failures traced to 2 root causes: (a) orphan Python tests at tests/workflow/test_{get_agent_history,sync_session_documentation}.py target deleted .claude/skills/workflow/scripts/ files; (b) marketplace.json count assertions stale after plugin manifest count drop.

Deleted orphan tests/workflow/ Python tests (3 files). Auto-regenerated .claude-plugin/marketplace.json (70->67 skills) and .github/plugin/marketplace.json (82->79 skills) via build/scripts/validate_marketplace_counts.py --fix. Verified test_validate_marketplace_counts passes (18 tests). These are the same orphan-ref class of failures that issue #1939 (orphan-ref-validator skill) is designed to catch pre-commit.
